scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && mv dist/index.source.html dist/index.html
scripts.release:pages: npm run build && rsync -a --delete dist/assets/ assets/ && cp dist/index.html index.html && cp dist/mentions-legales.html mentions-legales.html && cp dist/conditions-generales-de-vente.html conditions-generales-de-vente.html && cp dist/confidentialite.html confidentialite.html && cp dist/favicon-32.png favicon-32.png && cp dist/apple-touch-icon.png apple-touch-icon.png
